name: Double Decoding of the Same Data
description: The product decodes the same input data twice, allowing attackers to bypass security filters that operate between the two decoding steps — the first decode passes the filter, the second decode reveals the malicious payload.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides double-encoded data that passes through TRANSFORM[decode_1]→CONTROL[security_filter]→TRANSFORM[decode_2] where the filter checks the singly-decoded form but the doubly-decoded form contains the malicious payload, without a CONTROL[single_canonical_decode] that ensures data is fully decoded before any security check
